---
title: "ASHA 2023: Aphasia Treatment Dosage from Efficacy to Real World Evidence"
author: Rob Cavanaugh
date: 2023-11-15
image: preview.png
categories: [aphasia, ASHA]
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

#### Treatment Dosage in Aphasia Rehabilitation: From Research Efficacy to Real-World Evidence

<a href="asha-2023.pdf"><img src="preview2.png" alt="ASHA 2023: Aphasia Treatment Dosage from Efficacy to Real World Evidence" style="width:80%;display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;"></a>

***2023 American Speech-Language Hearing Association Convention, Boston, MA***
